title: T-027 — GET /api/production/work-orders/:id/material-status (FEFO context)
prompt:
# T-027 — GET /work-orders/:id/material-status

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.2 FR-08-E2 (consumed by SCN-080), §8.2.4

## Goal
Implement GET /api/production/work-orders/[id]/material-status returning per-component planned vs consumed totals plus FEFO LP suggestions (top 3 by expiry).

## Implementation contract
App Router GET /api/production/work-orders/[id]/material-status. Read wo_materials (BOM snapshot) join wo_material_consumption sums per component. For each component, query 05-WH for top-3 FEFO LP candidates (call existing 05-WH FEFO suggestion API). Return JSON {wo_id, components:[{component_id, planned_qty, consumed_qty, remaining_qty, fefo_lp_suggestions:[{lp_id, expiry_date, qty_available, location}, ...]}]}. Cache 30s.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/material-status/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/material-status/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/get-material-status.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given WO with 3 BOM components and 2 consumed at 50%, when GET material-status, then components[0].consumed_qty equals 50% of planned_qty and remaining_qty matches
2. Given 5 LPs available for component, when GET, then fefo_lp_suggestions returns top 3 sorted ascending by expiry_date
3. Given non-existent wo_id, when GET, then 404

## Test strategy
- RED: route test asserting per-component sums + top-3 FEFO ordering before route exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test material-status'

## Risk red lines
- Do not return more than 3 FEFO suggestions (operator UX clutter)
- Do not skip RLS
- Do not cache >30s (operator-facing FEFO must be near-real-time)

pipeline_inputs.description: GET material-status returning per-component progress + top-3 FEFO LP suggestions for SCN-080.
pipeline_inputs.details: Read BOM snapshot + sums of consumption per component. Call 05-WH FEFO suggestion adapter for each component to fetch top-3 LPs by expiry. cacheLife({stale:30}). Per-tenant RLS enforced.
out_of_scope: Do not implement 05-WH FEFO suggestion logic
Do not implement output progress (T-021 covers)
acceptance_criteria: Given 3 components 2 consumed at 50%, when GET, then components[0].consumed_qty matches and remaining_qty correct
Given 5 LPs available, when GET, then fefo_lp_suggestions returns top 3 ascending by expiry_date
Given non-existent wo_id, when GET, then 404
test_strategy: RED: route test asserting sums + top-3 FEFO before route exists
